description: Curated shortlist of local routines and external skills for reliable BMO operator workstations.

local_routines.name: openclaw-agent-split
local_routines.why: Verify host main-agent routing and the bmo-tron worker split before deeper runtime work.

local_routines.name: telegram-routing
local_routines.why: Confirm Telegram is bound to the host-facing main agent instead of the worker.

local_routines.name: telegram-coding-dispatch
local_routines.why: Turn vague phone-style Telegram coding requests into a structured brief and a safe coding run.

local_routines.name: skills-access-diagnosis
local_routines.why: Diagnose missing, stuck, or invisible skills before adding more capability.

local_routines.name: bootstrap-recovery
local_routines.why: Recover broken bootstrap state without guesswork.

local_routines.name: context-sync
local_routines.why: Keep repo, host context, and workspace mirror aligned.

local_routines.name: browser-automation
local_routines.why: Document the sanctioned browser automation profile before enabling browser-driving skills.

community_shortlist.why: Reliable GitHub issue, PR, and repo operations through the gh CLI.
community_shortlist.notes: Review auth scope before enabling write operations.

community_shortlist.why: Explainable search and retrieval flows for web research.
community_shortlist.notes: Keep network policy narrow and confirm the result is operator-visible.

community_shortlist.why: Stronger local file and directory analysis for repo-scale work.
community_shortlist.notes: Prefer workspace-scoped approval if the host has sensitive paths.

community_shortlist.why: Browser automation for real UI workflows after the baseline pack is stable.
community_shortlist.notes: Enable only on workstations with an explicit browser automation policy.

community_shortlist.why: Low-friction note capture and search on operator MacBooks that already use Bear.
community_shortlist.notes: Optional. Skip it on machines that do not already use Bear.
